title: Maternity Clothing - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Maternity Clothing 11 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BIRTHRIGHT OF SALEM PREGNANCY AND PARENT SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, parenting support, parenting classes, and community referrals. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. 1880 Lancaster Drive NE Suite 124 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Expectant families and new parents Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-1pm, Wednesday 10am-4pm Email (503) 585-2273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Basic goods are offered to clients as they are donated. Goods available may include, but are not limited to household items (cleaning supplies, laundry detergent, toilet paper, and paper towels), personal care supplies (such as toothbrushes and shampoo), durable medical goods, diapers and wipes, linens, towels and blankets, kitchenware (dishes, pots and pans, glasses, etc), and baby blankets. Connects people in need with local churches and service agencies. No financial assistance is available. 1606 Santiam Road SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Low income individuals and families Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-1pm, Tuesday 5pm-8pm Email (541) 924-5683 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST A FAMILY PLACE MCMINNVILLE CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, maternity clothing, and emergency diapers. Families can receive a 3-day supply of diapers once a month when supplies are available. 125 SE Cowls Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Families in need of diapers and clothing for children ages 0-5, or those who need maternity clothing Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST A FAMILY PLACE NEWBERG CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, maternity clothing, and emergency diapers. Families can receive a 3-day supply of diapers once a month when supplies are available. 600 E 6th Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Diapers and children's clothing: Families with children ages 0-5 Maternity clothing: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST A FAMILY PLACE WILLAMINA CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, maternity clothing, and emergency diapers. Families can receive a 3-day supply of diapers once a month when supplies are available. 1100 NE Oaken Hills Drive Willamina, OR 97396 Eligibility: Families with minor children ages 0-5 Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARLA'S MALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with books, toys, household items, new hygiene products, knick-knacks, and clothing including interview or work-appropriate attire. Offers volunteer work experience and credit recovery for students working at the store. Also accepts donations of new and gently used items. 2500 E Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Volunteers: Baker School District high school students Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 8am-11am and 1pm-4pm, closed holidays. Hours are subject to change. Summer hours: June 16th-July 17th Monday-Thursday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (541) 524-2309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER CLOTHING AND BABY SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides maternity clothing and supplies for pregnant women and nursing mothers. Also provides baby clothing, baby blankets, sleepers, toys and children's books, as well as emergency supplies of diapers, formula, and baby food. Strollers, infant bathtubs, car seats, and pack and plays available dependent on availability. Parents are encouraged to become a client (which is free) and allows access to more services. Diapers and formula are available for emergency needs only and not provided on an ongoing basis. Mother & Child is not a clothing closet; it is a program which has supplies to assist families but also focuses on education and support. 1515 NE 41st Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Pregnant or parents/primary caregivers of a child aged birth to 5 years old. No eligibility requirements based on income. The client must be able to come to the Mother and Child Education Center to receive services. Diapers, clothing, and other goods cannot be mailed or delivered to clients. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm, Friday 10am-2pm Email (503) 249-5801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SAINT HELENS COLUMBIA FAMILY RESOURCES RAINIER WOMEN'S CREEKSIDE CLINIC PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those who are experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include free pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, parenting support, maternity clothing and infant clothing and community referrals. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. You do not have to participate in classes to be eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. Clients who participate in the classes are eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. 305 W 3rd Street Suite C Rainier, OR 97048 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 1pm-5pm, Thursday 10am-2pm (503) 556-4590 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SAINT HELENS COLUMBIA FAMILY RESOURCES PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those who are experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include free pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, parenting support, maternity clothing and infant clothing and community referrals. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. You do not have to participate in classes to be eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. Clients who participate in the classes are eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. 970 Columbia Boulevard Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 1pm-5pm, Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (503) 397-6047 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST GERMAINE PREGNANCY CENTER PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, parenting support, and community referrals. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. You do not have to participate in classes to be eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. 3855 Wolverine Street NE Suite A2 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Expectant families and new parents Hours: Monday 10am-4pm, Tuesday 1pm-4pm, Wednesday/Friday 10am-1pm Email (503) 363-2525 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST MARK'S LUTHERAN CHURCH BETHLEHEM CHILDREN’S CLOTHES CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children’s clothing (sizes preemie through teens), maternity clothing, baby supplies (diapers, wipes, pull-ups, formula, and car seats), and toys, while supplies last. Also accepts donations 5415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Ages 0-17 for clothing; expectant parents Hours: Clothing: By appointment only Donations: Tuesday-Friday 10am-3pm Email (503) 777-1443 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BIRTHRIGHT OF SALEM PREGNANCY AND PARENT SUPPORT SERVICES LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK MARLA'S MALL MARLA'S MALL MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER CLOTHING AND BABY SUPPLIES SAINT HELENS COLUMBIA FAMILY RESOURCES PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES SAINT HELENS COLUMBIA FAMILY RESOURCES PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES ST GERMAINE PREGNANCY CENTER PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES ST MARK'S LUTHERAN CHURCH BETHLEHEM CHILDREN’S CLOTHES CLOSET
